metadata.description: Official Splashify Pro plugin for Claude Code — WhatsApp/RCS messaging, broadcasts, templates, contacts, AI agents, email marketing, and analytics. Drives the splashify CLI; no credentials in the plugin.

plugins.name: splashifypro
plugins.description: Drive a Splashify Pro account from Claude Code — every WhatsApp/RCS/Instagram action via the splashify CLI. The CLI holds the user's oc_live_ token; Claude never sees it.
